title: Yet Another Optimization Modpack
description: Yet Another Optimization Modpack: A Client side Modpack designed to improve performance and Visuals!
body:
# **Yet Another Optimization Modpack**


**A Client side Modpack designed to improve performance and Visuals!**


Inspired by the many other Optimization Modpacks on Modrinth i have decided to make my own version of an Optimization Modpack!

### **400+ FPS** _(without shaders)_

![FPS Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccf786c82228498fa3f144755da899e67350706f.png)!

### **80+ FPS** _(with complementary shaders)_

![FPS Image with shaders (complementary reimagined)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bcd9d609a70fe333fbe04843fb52d7d31ae3701.png)

_Message me on Discord for Questions/Requests/Feedback
"blizzard8562"_

_Also check out one of my other Projects:_
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-adventures](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-adventures)
